title: Add Sex Life Tracking & Safe/Unsafe Sex Period Guidance

requirements.text: Add a backend data model and API to log sexual activity entries. Each entry should store: date, whether protection was used (boolean), and optional notes. Support create, read, update, and delete operations. Associate entries with the authenticated user.

quotes: Need to add sex life tracking and when to have safe sex and when to not options

acceptanceCriteria: A new stable data structure exists in the backend actor for sexual activity entries (date, protectionUsed, optional notes, userId).
Backend exposes create, read, update, and delete methods for sexual activity entries.
Only the authenticated caller can access their own sexual activity entries.
Sexual activity entries are persisted across canister upgrades.

requirements.text: Extend the backend to return a safe/unsafe sex period status for any given date, based on the user's cycle data and fertility phase calculations. Return one of: 'safe', 'unsafe', or 'caution' based on whether the date falls in the menstrual/luteal phase (safe), fertile window/ovulation (unsafe), or transition days (caution).

quotes: when to have safe sex and when to not options

acceptanceCriteria: A backend function accepts a date and returns a safe-sex status ('safe', 'unsafe', or 'caution') based on the user's logged cycle data.
Ovulation day and fertile window days are classified as 'unsafe'.
Menstrual and late luteal phase days are classified as 'safe'.
Transition days bordering fertile windows are classified as 'caution'.
The function returns a meaningful response even when cycle data is limited.

requirements.text: Add a new 'Intimacy' page accessible from the main navigation. The page must include: (1) A safe/unsafe sex period indicator showing today's status with color-coded visual (green = safe, red = unsafe, yellow = caution), along with a brief explanation of why that period is safe or not. (2) A sexual activity log section where users can add, view, edit, and delete entries (date, protection used toggle, optional notes). Apply the existing rose/blush/cream warm theme consistently.

quotes: Need to add sex life tracking and when to have safe sex and when to not options

acceptanceCriteria: A new 'Intimacy' route and page component exists and is reachable from the app navigation.
The page displays today's safe/unsafe sex status with a color-coded indicator (green/yellow/red) and an explanatory message based on cycle phase.
A form allows users to log a new sexual activity entry with date, protection used toggle, and optional notes.
Past sexual activity entries are listed in reverse chronological order with edit and delete options.
Each log entry shows date, protection status (icon/badge), and notes if present.
The page requires authentication; unauthenticated users are prompted to log in.
The page follows the existing rose/blush/cream warm feminine visual theme.

requirements.text: Add React Query hooks in useQueries.ts to wire the new Intimacy page to the backend: hooks for fetching all sexual activity entries, creating a new entry, updating an entry, deleting an entry, and fetching the safe-sex status for today's date.

quotes: Need to add sex life tracking and when to have safe sex and when to not options

acceptanceCriteria: A useGetSexActivityEntries hook fetches the authenticated user's logged entries.
A useCreateSexActivityEntry mutation hook creates a new entry and invalidates the entries query.
An useUpdateSexActivityEntry mutation hook updates an existing entry.
A useDeleteSexActivityEntry mutation hook deletes an entry and invalidates the entries query.
A useGetSafeSexStatus hook fetches today's safe/unsafe/caution status from the backend.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
All backend logic must remain in the single actor in backend/main.mo.
Sexual activity data must be scoped strictly to the authenticated caller — no cross-user access.
Maintain the existing rose/blush/cream warm feminine visual theme across all new UI.
nonGoals: No contraception tracking, prescription, or medical advice features.
No integration with external health APIs or third-party services.
No real-time notifications for sexual activity reminders.
No changes to existing cycle logging, reminders, education, or settings screens.
